title: Pan-Seared Fish with Italian Redcurrant Sauce
description: A light and flavorful dish that combines the sweetness of redcurrants with the crispiness of fresh vegetables.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season cod fillets with salt and pepper.
Add garlic to the skillet and sauté for 1 minute.
Add cod fillets to the skillet and sear for 3-4 minutes per side.
Transfer cod fillets to a plate and set aside.
Add redcurrants, lemon juice, and basil to the skillet.
Simmer the sauce for 2-3 minutes or until reduced slightly.
Serve the cod fillets with the redcurrant sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with additional basil leaves if desired.
